text: The sterile, modern architecture outside feels somewhat cold and impersonal, yet as I move into the exhibit space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The bold colors and the prominent 'R+D' invite me inward, promising contemplation on the relationship between humans and technology. I feel like a seeker at the edge of discovery, at once isolated by the clinical quiet, but also invigorated by the creative energy that pulses from the wall. Here, I am both observer and participant—my thoughts becoming part of the ongoing research and experimentation that the room represents.
